intentSynonyms: get a for you feed in tiktok
look up a for you feed in tiktok

description: Get the personalized "For You" feed of recommended TikTok videos. Returns trending and personalized video content based on the user's interests and activity.

count.description: Number of videos to return (default 10, max 30)
